hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [ "$(basename "$f" 2>/dev/null)" = "financas.html" ]; then node .github/scripts/check-inline-js.js financas.html; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [ "$(basename "$f" 2>/dev/null)" = "database.rules.json" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Lembrete: publique as novas regras no Firebase Console > Realtime Database > Rules > Publish (o deploy nao e automatico)."}'; fi; }
